headline: Why IBM (IBM) Shares Are Plunging Today
summary: Shares of technology and consulting giant IBM (NYSE:IBM) fell 6.4% in the afternoon session after the combination of rising oil prices, higher Treasury yields, and shifting rate expectations tightened the macro backdrop for corporate clients.

headline: IBM Extends AI Narrative With Three Ws 3D Workspace Partnership
summary: IBM (NYSE:IBM) and three.ws announced a partnership to integrate AI powered 3D workspaces with IBM's enterprise AI and hybrid cloud. The collaboration connects three.ws's 3D environments with IBM's foundation model suite, governance tools, and hybrid cloud infrastructure. The deal targets interactive, memory enriched AI agents for regulated industries and complex enterprise settings. For IBM, this agreement adds a new dimension to its focus on enterprise AI, hybrid cloud, and security...

headline: HPE’s AI Orders Double With One Major Catch
summary: When Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) reported its Q2 results, (Oct. year), it delivered a report card so strong that it fundamentally reset market expectations. Driving that shift was a massive pivot in guidance: management announced it now expects to generate “at least $3.5 billion” in free cash flow this year. Those are the same milestones the company had originally targeted for the long term, now pulled forward a full two years.

content.title: HPE’s AI Orders Double With One Major Catch
content.summary: When Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) reported its Q2 results, (Oct. year), it delivered a report card so strong that it fundamentally reset market expectations. Driving that shift was a massive pivot in guidance: management announced it now expects to generate “at least $3.5 billion” in free cash flow this year. Those are the same milestones the company had originally targeted for the long term, now pulled forward a full two years.
